form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation by head Vaal January 24 over 1800m defeating Pioneer Square with 55.5kg at $13.50. First up last campaign fourth of 10 at this track October 4 over 1200m, 2 len behind Miami Mountain carrying 60kg at $6. Handy galloper with a strong fresh record. Expect a forward showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation by head Vaal January 24 over 1800m defeating Pioneer Square with 55.5kg at $13.50. First up last campaign fourth of 10 at this track October 4 over 1200m, 2 len behind Miami Mountain carrying 60kg at $6. Handy galloper with a strong fresh record. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: Placed last three including a third of 8 at Turffontein Standside in the G2 April 4 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Cats Pajamas carrying 58kg at $17. Won only try course and distance. On the quick back up in much easier grade. Expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9.5). Placed last three including a third of 8 at Turffontein Standside in the G2 April 4 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Cats Pajamas carrying 58kg at $17. Won only try course and distance. On the quick back up in much easier grade. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: At the latest run 3rd of 8 at Turffontein Standside on March 14 over 1800m, 3 len behind Choisaanada carrying 54kg at $67. The race before that ran last of 8 at this track on February 12 over 1800m, 8 len behind Tommy Shelby carrying 61kg at $21. Impossible to entertain.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). At the latest run 3rd of 8 at Turffontein Standside on March 14 over 1800m, 3 len behind Choisaanada carrying 54kg at $67. The race before that ran last of 8 at this track on February 12 over 1800m, 8 len behind Tommy Shelby carrying 61kg at $21. Impossible to entertain.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in away from the crop from the 200m.
Bumped out by Hawkbill at approximately the 800m.
Shortly after the start, bumped by Royal Edition and lost ground to the field.

form.formComment: Last start 4th of 10 at Turffontein Standside in LR on April 4 over 2850m, 11 len behind Enflame with 54kg at $34. The race before that 5th of 8 at Turffontein Standside on March 14 over 1800m, 4.5 len behind Choisaanada carrying 52kg at $41. Genuine chance this time around.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7.5). Last start 4th of 10 at Turffontein Standside in LR on April 4 over 2850m, 11 len behind Enflame with 54kg at $34. The race before that 5th of 8 at Turffontein Standside on March 14 over 1800m, 4.5 len behind Choisaanada carrying 52kg at $41. Genuine chance this time around.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, came together and bumped with Bob's Your Uncle.

form.formComment: At the latest run second last of 8 at this track on March 12 over 1450m, slow going 7 len behind Tintin carrying 60kg at $26. The start before that 4th of 7 at Vaal on January 22 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind The Specialist carrying 60kg at $3.80. Nicely placed to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). At the latest run second last of 8 at this track on March 12 over 1450m, slow going 7 len behind Tintin carrying 60kg at $26. The start before that 4th of 7 at Vaal on January 22 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind The Specialist carrying 60kg at $3.80. Nicely placed to bounce back.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last preparation second last of 7 at Turffontein Standside on January 3 over 1800m, 6 len behind The Playboy Bomber carrying 62.5kg at $41. When resuming last campaign 5th of 7 at Turffontein Standside on August 2 over 1800m, 4.5 len behind The Equator with 54kg at $17. Happy to work around.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(7.5). Back from a spell. Only had one start last preparation second last of 7 at Turffontein Standside on January 3 over 1800m, 6 len behind The Playboy Bomber carrying 62.5kg at $41. When resuming last campaign 5th of 7 at Turffontein Standside on August 2 over 1800m, 4.5 len behind The Equator with 54kg at $17. Happy to work around.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Apprentice T Mayhew did not persevere with his riding from the 600m.
Approaching the 400m, came together with Flashy Apache and brushed.

form.formComment: Most recently 3rd of 11 at Vaal on March 31 over 1500m, 0.5 len behind Bob's Your Uncle carrying 58kg at $51. The start before that 9th of 11 at Turffontein Standside on March 21 over 1160m, 12 len behind Ziyasha with 48.8kg at $101. Draws the fence and looks a genuine chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Most recently 3rd of 11 at Vaal on March 31 over 1500m, 0.5 len behind Bob's Your Uncle carrying 58kg at $51. The start before that 9th of 11 at Turffontein Standside on March 21 over 1160m, 12 len behind Ziyasha with 48.8kg at $101. Draws the fence and looks a genuine chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hanging in in the latter stages.
Slow into stride. Changed stride continually in running.

previousStarts.trainer: W O MARWING W H MARWING

form.formComment: Last start 9th of 13 at Turffontein Standside in LR on March 14 over 2000m, 6 len behind Diogenes with 60kg at $13.50. The start before that 9th of 13 at Turffontein Standside in the G2 Gauteng Guineas on February 7 over 1600m, 9 len behind Splittheeights carrying 60kg at $126. Finds a few better today. Can't recommend.

formComments.title: TAB

Can't recommend.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At approximately the 1200m, carried out by Tommy Shelby.
Did not persevere with his riding in the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Comes off a 58 day let-up. Most recently in a small field at Vaal on February 10 over 2000m, 5 len behind Bakwena with 56.5kg at $4.30. The race before that ran last in a small field at Vaal on January 8 over 1800m, 10 len behind Gerbera carrying 59kg at $11. Genuine contender under these conditions.
